open_findings: Phase 0 review-index built: 16 agents, 6 subagents, 47 skills, 27 instructions, 23 prompts, 32 validators, 77 npm scripts, 16 hooks, 8 CI workflows, 0 IaC projects, 2 MCP servers, 63 site pages. Orphans: 25 skills (likely standalone), 1 validator (validate-governance-trace.mjs), 39 npm scripts (mostly aliases/CLI utilities). Index at agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/review-index.json

Phase 1 complete. Validators: 22 pass / 7 warn / 2 fail. BLOCKERS: F1.2 validate:agents fails on .github/prompts/project-wide-review.prompt.md (agent: agent placeholder, missing model:); F1.3 lint:docs-freshness fails on 7 vendor-prompting reference files missing canary markers. ORPHAN: F1.1 validate-governance-trace.mjs not wired to npm/hook/CI. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/01-validators.md

Phase 1 hot-fixes applied (F1.1, F1.2, F1.3, F1.8). Validators now 24 pass / 7 warn / 0 fail. Files changed: .github/prompts/project-wide-review.prompt.md (added model: Claude Opus 4.7), 7 vendor-prompting reference files (added canary markers), package.json (added validate:governance-trace alias), tools/scripts/validate-orphaned-content.mjs (registry-aware + azure-diagrams known-unlinked). Registry skills/capability_skills decision: keep both fields - they are load-bearing for validate-agent-registry, validate-registry-skill-coverage, generate-explorer-graph, and the agent-registry schema.

Created persistent review-plan.md (agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/review-plan.md) and updated .github/prompts/project-wide-review.prompt.md to require the plan file (Phase 0 step 7, rules maintenance protocol, resume-vs-fresh-start preamble, output contract entry). Plan tracks: phase status, scope decision, counts snapshot, open findings (with severity/status), deferred sub-table, hot-fix log, decisions log, artifacts index, maintenance protocol. Fresh chat can resume from review-plan.md + review-index.json + apex-recall show alone.

Phase 2 complete. Registries clean: agent-registry, model-catalog, workflow-graph, explorer-graph, count-manifest, source-freshness all in sync. NEW FINDINGS: F2.1 (high) vendor-prompting-rules.schema.json declares ref:string but data has ref:null for anthropic live doc - schema bug not data bug; F2.2 (medium) two schemas orphaned (vendor-prompting-rules, lesson-log) - no validator loads them; F2.4 (info) lint:json-schemas only checks 2 mappings despite the broad name. F2.3 (low) deferred. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/02-registries.md

Phase 2 hot-fixes applied (F2.1, F2.2, F2.3, F2.4). Validators now 25 pass / 6 warn / 0 fail. Files changed: tools/schemas/vendor-prompting-rules.schema.json (ref type+schema draft), .vscode/settings.json (+2 mappings), tools/scripts/validate-json-schemas.mjs (glob expansion + ajv-formats + scope docs), .github/agents/e2e-orchestrator.agent.md (descriptive language), .github/skills/vendor-prompting/references/audit-procedure.md (descriptive language). All schemas in tools/schemas/ now have validator wiring.

Phase 3 complete. Workflow DAG + table sync clean. Agent registry clean. All 22 agent files <500 lines. Subagents all invokable=false (registry+frontmatter). 0 unresolved handoff refs. NEW FINDINGS: F3.1 (low) e2e-orchestrator workflow-engine should be in skills[] not capability_skills[]; F3.2 (medium) azure-governance-discovery digest H2s drift from source - agent fallback risk; F3.3 (low) drawio SKILL.md 301 lines exceeds 200-line guideline with references; F3.4 (low,deferred) 43 handoff-enrichment baseline warnings; F3.5 (info) 01-orchestrator at 494/500 lines. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/03-agents.md

Phase 3 hot-fixes applied (F3.1-F3.5 all fixed). Validators: 28 pass / 3 warn / 0 fail (was 25/6/0). Files: tools/registry/agent-registry.json (workflow-engine moved to skills[]), .github/skills/azure-governance-discovery/SKILL.digest.md (H2s realigned to source), .github/skills/drawio/SKILL.md (301->197 lines, moved Layout Conventions to references/style-reference.md), 13 agent files (43 handoffs enriched with semantic Input/Output annotations via tmp/fix-handoff-enrichment.mjs), .github/agents/01-orchestrator.agent.md (494->484 lines, removed redundant example block). Remaining warnings are deferred per <rules>: 1 claude-output-contract-001 (11-context-optimizer) + 21 lint:drawio aks example HTML escapes + 7 instruction-checks orphan refs (visible in registry-coverage).

Cleaned up the 3 deferred warnings (now classified F1.6 fixed, F4.1, F4.2). Validators now: 31 pass / 0 warn / 0 fail (was 28/3/0). Files: .github/agents/11-context-optimizer.agent.md (added <output_contract>), tools/scripts/validate-drawio-files.mjs (Check 12 fixed - was checking decoded value not raw, false-positive on properly escaped HTML), site/public/demo/03-des-diagram.drawio (palette aligned to APEX), tools/scripts/validate-instruction-checks.mjs (added azure.yaml to RUNTIME_ONLY_PATTERNS). Validator bug F1.6: fast-xml-parser auto-decodes < entities so the original heuristic flagged every legitimately-escaped cell.

Phase 4 complete. Clean state: lint:skills-format pass, validate:skill-checks pass (47 skills), validate:instruction-checks pass (62 cross-refs), lint:orphaned-content 0 warnings. 0 skills > 200 lines without references/. 0 skills missing description. 0 instructions missing applyTo or description. All 8 skills consumed by context-shredding agents have digest + minimal. 25 standalone skills are intentional public-API surface. No new Phase 4 findings — prior hot-fixes (F1.8, F3.2, F3.3, F4.2) covered all issues. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/04-skills-instructions.md

Phase 5 complete. 23 prompts (21 in .github/prompts/, 2 in tools/tests/prompts/). All have description. 15 are custom-agent prompts (correctly inherit model). 8 are generic (agent: agent + explicit model). prompt-model-source-001 rule: 0 violations. All prompt agent: fields resolve to a real agent or the generic placeholder. The earlier F1.2 violation on this very prompt file was fixed in Phase 1. No new findings. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/05-prompts.md

Phase 6 complete. No IaC projects exist (infra/bicep and infra/terraform contain only AGENTS.md). validate:iac-security-baseline correctly handles empty case and exits 0 with informational messages. Per-project checks (bicep build/lint, terraform fmt/validate, AVM compliance, azure.yaml resolution) skipped per prompt instructions for the no-project case. The IaC tracks are bootstrapped and ready - first project authored will trigger all wired validators automatically. No findings. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/06-iac.md

Phase 7 complete. azure-pricing MCP: 214 tests pass / 22 deselected (Python pytest in workspace .venv); v4.0.0; wired in .vscode/mcp.json. drawio MCP: 29 test suites / 918 steps pass (was 27/2 failing); v3.0.1; wired. lint:mcp-config passes. F7.1 hot-fixed: drawio watermark tests asserted upstream simonkurtz-MSFT branding but source was APEX-rebranded - aligned 4 assertions in tests/watermark.test.ts. F7.2 (low, open): drawio Deno tests have no npm/CI wiring - deferred to Phase 9 follow-up. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/07-mcp.md

Phase 8 complete. Site builds clean: 63 pages, all internal links valid, 8.26s build time. Architecture explorer graph counts traceable to filesystem (16 agents, 6 subagents, 47 skills, 27 instructions, 21 prompts in .github/prompts only, 35 validator scripts, 9 workflow nodes, 6 MCP servers). Live count discipline: agents.md, skills-and-instructions.md, glossary.md all cite count-manifest.json instead of hard-coding. Changelog point-in-time entries exempt via validator allowlist. No new findings. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/08-site.md

Phase 9 complete. lefthook.yml parallel:false invariant on pre-commit verified with documented stage_fixed race rationale. test:hooks runs 34 bats safety tests successfully. Wired tests: vendor-prompting (run.test.mjs), test_apex_recall, test:hooks, test:governance-discovery. Unwired tests (run-pass but no CI): F9.1 classify-model.test.mjs (13 tests, MEDIUM - guards classifier driving every vendor rule severity), F9.2 (=F7.2 drawio MCP), F9.3 test_convert_drawio_icons.py (26 tests, LOW build-time), F9.4 azure-pricing tests (214 tests, LOW lint-only chain). Phase 9 hot-fixes applied (F9.1-F9.4 all fixed). 4 new npm scripts: test:classify-model, test:drawio-mcp, test:convert-drawio-icons, test:azure-pricing-mcp. Wirings: F9.1 added to validate:_node + validate:_node-ci + lefthook agents block (runs on every agent/prompt commit, ~100ms cost); F9.2 + F9.3 added as new jobs in weekly-maintenance.yml (Deno setup for drawio MCP, Python+pytest setup for icon converter); F9.4 added to validate:_external (alongside test:apex-recall). All 4 verified passing locally: classify-model 13/13, drawio-mcp 29 suites/918 steps, icon-converter 26/26, azure-pricing 214/214. validate:_node-ci exits 0 with test:classify-model wired in.

Phase 10 complete. 6 cross-domain checks: 1 (prompt agents) ✅; 2 (registry skill coverage) ✅; 3 (validator rule IDs) ✅ all 16 IDs registered including legacy-001..004; 4 (orphan npm scripts) ⚠️ 5 real gaps in 41 reported; 5 (site count drift) ✅; 6 (instruction applyTo) ✅. Report: agent-output/_baselines/review-20260505T074943Z/10-cross-domain.md

Phase 10 hot-fixes applied (F10.1-F10.3 all fixed). F10.1: weekly-maintenance.yml docs-freshness job now runs npm run audit:quarterly (covers lint:glob-audit + lint:orphaned-content + lint:docs-freshness); job renamed to Quarterly Audit; issue body updated. F10.2: validate:no-hardcoded-counts + validate:terminology added to validate:_node-ci; CI now enforces hard-coded count discipline + terminology blocklist on every PR. F10.3: ci.yml gained external-tests job (Python 3.12, pip install -e for apex-recall and azure-pricing, then runs both test suites). All YAML validates. validate:_node-ci exits 0 with new validators included.
